name: code-review
description: Analyze code for bugs, style issues, performance problems, and security vulnerabilities. Produces actionable feedback with severity levels.

steps.template:
Review the following code (language: {{language}}, focus: {{focus}}):

{{code}}

Analyze for:
1. Bugs: Logic errors, off-by-one, null/undefined access, race conditions
2. Security: Injection, XSS, auth bypass, secrets exposure, unsafe deserialization
3. Performance: N+1 queries, unnecessary allocations, blocking operations, missing indexes
4. Style: Naming conventions, code organization, DRY violations, complexity
5. Architecture: SOLID violations, coupling, missing abstractions, testability

Format findings (threshold: {{severity_threshold}}):

For each issue:
- [SEVERITY] Line X: Brief title
  - What: Description of the problem
  - Why: Impact if not fixed
  - Fix: Suggested correction (code snippet if applicable)

Summary:
- Total issues: X (critical: N, error: N, warning: N, info: N)
- Overall quality: [score/10]
- Top 3 priorities to address
- Positive observations (good patterns found)
